TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == mutung == hani maazih ku mutung i Taywan sabul mahmin 400-700 bayu'-takalaw. u papah sa lima-kakuniza, 3-5 bulad sibalu a demiad. sawsawni i Taychun i Taytung i Kalingku i Nantou mazih tu mutung. u balu sa izaw ku sangelacay, izaw ku kalawlaway, bangcal ku balu. u siwkay nu nipaluma u limay ku papah a mutung, u mutung, mitesekay a nipangangan : Akebia quinata han, nu hulam a ngangan sa mu-tung han. u mutung a kaput , mutung a su a kilang. u angangan nu lamit niza, u sasapaiyuen nu kanpuyuku. u heci niza panganganen tu akepi han. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: šļĒŤĎČśú®ťÄö(Ś≠łŚźć:Akebia quinata), .) u a-ke-pi hananay, u heci nu limaay ku papah a mutung, nu sayaway a silangaw na i Dipun, caay kal alecad ku heci tu nu tuluay ku papah mutung-waluay bulad a kuwak, akenek acedah ku heci nu akepi, sicedam ku heci nu waluay bulad a kuwak a heci. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) misitekeday a wayway u mlaladay a kilang, azihen ku hekal nu mutung, mahiza u lima ku wayway nu papah, lima ku adidiay a papah, i sadingsingan mabuhat ku balu, u tatama tu tatayna mapulungay i akaway, nika tabaki ku balu nu tatayna, kala kiyukiyuan makulahay ku kulit, adidi ku balu nu tatama , kalasumanah kiyukiyuan ku kulit, siciyaw-ke-liay ku sanek, masakimulu ku heci nu heci . limaay ku papah a mutung, mapelu'ay a kilang milalibetay a kilang, tanayu sa tuluay ktukuh sabawlima mi , mamin nu udip nayi ku banuh. u heci katukuh balangbangan tu kasienawan macait i nipikayakay, caay henay kaduhem sa u sumilaway ku kulit, anu maduhem sa u ekiman takuliyaway ku kulit. u hekal mahida u mangku, labuay a heci mahida u maduhem dawmiay a alupal. u paenu sa mahida nu ciyak a paenu. mangduay a ciid u abuabuan sumilaway ku kulit, idaw ku mabalatay a kubid. hatini u lima katabaki nu papah, masaupu i apuyuay a ciid nu tatungduhan, akaway makidic tanayu. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) lalud mabuhat sibalu tu kiyukiyuan a kulit nu balu. ubalu nu titiaheci, mahida u nuli, tanayu' ku samulmul, mahida u buwa' ku wayway, tusa masakimulu, tanayu walu a li-mi , patelek tusa tu tulu a li-mi , maduhem sa nu kiyuay a kulit, dawmi', mududuc tu bili a keliw macengat. yadah ku sapaluma,ya tanayuay tiekukay azihen ku hekay mapipiay, lumeniay atu lumeni takuliyaway ku kulit. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) langawan atu kalakalakan nutaw a kanatal nikalakalak: Ing-nan , Se-cuwang , Kuwang-tung , Kuwang-si , Hu-pey , Cing-si , An-huey , Ciang-su , Hu-nan , Kang-su Hu-cieng , Ce-ciyang . (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) nutaw a kanatal nikalakalak: Caw-sian, Dipun. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: ŚúčŚ§ĖŚąÜŚłÉ:śúĚťģģ,śó•śú¨) sakaydihan nuda a epuc u heci kapah kanen, i Ciyang-si-seng pin-siyang-se liyaw-ciya-wan itiniay kamu sa lateng-paw sa, i liyaw-ciya-wan a kamu sa new-luang-tu han, nu I buyu'buyu'an a heci. siwaay atu cacay a bataan a bulad idaw ku maduhemay a heci, nika ya caay henay ka duhemay a heci pelu'an sa padengen i belac a muduhem kiya kapah kanen, mahiniay a heci sa bangcal ku kulit, bangesis, kapahay ku sanek , asu'aca kanen, ayda i liyaw-ciya-wan , itiniay izaw ku nipatideng nuheni tu masaupuay a kaysiya hananay a milangat paluma . u Hu-ciey Min-si a kakitizaan, Ciyang-si Kan-nan a kakitizaan, atu itiniay i Kuwang-tung Ye-pey a kakitizaan, itini i timulay pinaay a pala caay kaadih, u sanek nida kapah, u mukeliday tu nu buyu'buyu'an a heci, mulaladay a mucelakay nipaluma. itiniay Ciyang-si Kan-nan a kakitizaan, Kuwang-tung Ye-pey a kakitizaan, na-ten , na-ten-paw sa. akaway sipisanga' tu sapaiyu, u mutung a kaput, mutung a su a nipaluma, u lamit atu akaway nu mutung sa kapah malasapaiyu, mihmihcaan kapah miyala, cipihcipihan mucikcik pawalien, u sapaiyu nu udiudipan, akenek, cueded sa. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: :Ťč¶,ŚĮí.) mutucek paiyu mutucek paiyu miasik tu udiudipan aisian, ukaukakan paculil tu idang, pasatedep tu adada, mucelip tu bena', pakasisalang tu cucu'. anu malalid ku taisian, utiih muisi, adada ku pukuh nu ukak, caay kakapah ku kabulad, taluisi'tu sumanahay singida, caay ka tahekal ku salang nu cucu'.mahiniay masulit i kanatal nu kanpuyaku a cuda (ciangku-cungcawyaw-heypey, "ŚÖ®Śúčšł≠ŤćČŤĎĮŚĆĮÁ∑®") (u kamu nu Hulam sa: ") tuluay a papah nu mutung tuluay a papah nu mutung, u yi-ce-ce sa. u kanpuyaku a ngangan sa, yi-ce-ce , waluay sicekaay, waluay a kuwa. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) nalimaan kauzip atu nikalakalak kauzipan nuheni nu hay-pa sa, i tuluay a lasubu katukuh cacay a malebut idaw ku luma a lasubu mi , u buyu'buyu'an caayay ka tabakiay a kilang, izaw aca i ilis nu kilakilangan atu wahelul nu cilicilisan. kalakalakan i Cang-ciyang lu-yi masasizumaay a pala. izaw aca ku nikalakalak i Dipun atu Caw-sieng . (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) mutung: idaw tu itini ku nikalakalk i Ha-tung a kakitizaan . acaken kya macapi tu maduhemay a heci malasapaiyuen. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) yi-ce-ce : u kanpuyaku a ngangan sa, u zayliw nu mahiniay sa maazih i Ciang-su , Hu-nang , Hu-pey , Se-cuwang , Ce-ciyang Aang-huey tini a kakitinian. nipawalian ku akaway tu lamit malasapaiyu. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: ť†źÁü•Ś≠ź: .) mupulu' mutung: i balangbangan mipelu', muala tu lamit, kayian ku adidiay ciid, hilhil han. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) yi-ce-ce : lalud, balangbangan tusa apuu', yu masa sumilaw takuliyaway azihen sa kiya mipecu'tu heci, pawalinen, atu patayden i mukulkulay a nisangasip tu nanum pacebu han alaen tu pawalin. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) mutung: hican malasapaiyu, mikapah tu isi', paculi tu bayking. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) yi-ce-ce : mipuut tu bayking, kapah paiyu tu gang nu cucu', atu saenuc tu nikan a gang, sipaiyu tu cebu anu sibaetu. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) usanek tu sapakapah akenek, cueded tu atudi. mibasaw tu lamal nu balucu', paisi', pakasisalang tu cucu'. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: Ťč¶, .) yi-ce-ce : misupi tu atay, paudip tu idang, paisi', mipatay tu cilekay. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) hican mu tucek a paiyu: akuti' ku baluwan hinalibut, adada ku takulaw, sumanah ku isi', malebawa, masukut ku udiudipan, masatedep kuni kabulad, nayi ku salang nu cucu'. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) yi-ce-ce : mabesu ku bili, masatedep ku nikabulad, caay kakapah ku niisi', kalatan nu bau atu cilekay a duka. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu Hulam Lipun atu Amilika "śú®ťÄö"Ťąá"ť¶¨ŚÖúťąī". Akebia quinata, commonly known as chocolate vine, five-leaf chocolate vine, or five-leaf akebia, is a shrub that is native to Japan, China and Korea, and naturalized in the eastern United States from Georgia to Michigan to Massachusetts.
S.PHON: == mutuŇč == ńßani maazińß ku mutuŇč i tajwan sabur~…ĺ mańßmin ***-*** baju Ē~ °-takar~…ĺaw. u papańß sa r~…ĺima-kakuniza, *-* bur~…ĺad sibar~…ĺu a d…ômiad. sawsawni i taj ¶ńßun i tajtuŇč i kar~…ĺiŇčku i nantou mazińß tu mutuŇč. u bar~…ĺu sa izaw ku saŇč…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj, izaw ku kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku bar~…ĺu. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u r~…ĺimaj ku papańß a mutuŇč, u mutuŇč, mit…ôs…ôkaj a nipaŇčaŇčan : ak…ôbia *uinata ńßan, nu ńßur~…ĺam a ŇčaŇčan sa mu-tuŇč ńßan. u mutuŇč a kaput , mutuŇč a su a kir~…ĺaŇč. u aŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺamit niza, u sasapaiju…ôn nu kanpujuku. u ńß…ô ¶i niza paŇčaŇčan…ôn tu ak…ôpi ńßan. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ****(**:ak…ôbia *uinata), .) u a-k…ô-pi ńßananaj, u ńß…ô ¶i nu r~…ĺimaaj ku papańß a mutuŇč, nu sajawaj a sir~…ĺaŇčaw na i dipun, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ ar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku ńß…ô ¶i tu nu tur~…ĺuaj ku papańß mutuŇč-war~…ĺuaj bur~…ĺad a kuwak, ak…ôn…ôk a ¶…ôdańß ku ńß…ô ¶i nu ak…ôpi, si ¶…ôdam ku ńß…ô ¶i nu war~…ĺuaj bur~…ĺad a kuwak a ńß…ô ¶i. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) misit…ôk…ôdaj a wajwaj u mr~…ĺar~…ĺadaj a kir~…ĺaŇč, azińß…ôn ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu mutuŇč, mańßiza u r~…ĺima ku wajwaj nu papańß, r~…ĺima ku adidiaj a papańß, i sadiŇčsiŇčan mabuńßat ku bar~…ĺu, u tatama tu tatajna mapur~…ĺuŇčaj i akawaj, nika tabaki ku bar~…ĺu nu tatajna, kar~…ĺa kijukijuan makur~…ĺańßaj ku kur~…ĺit, adidi ku bar~…ĺu nu tatama , kar~…ĺasumanańß kijukijuan ku kur~…ĺit, si ¶ijaw-k…ô-r~…ĺiaj ku san…ôk, masakimur~…ĺu ku ńß…ô ¶i nu ńß…ô ¶i . r~…ĺimaaj ku papańß a mutuŇč, map…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a kir~…ĺaŇč mir~…ĺar~…ĺib…ôtaj a kir~…ĺaŇč, tanaju sa tur~…ĺuaj ktukuńß sabawr~…ĺima mi , mamin nu udip naji ku banuńß. u ńß…ô ¶i katukuńß bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan tu kasi…ônawan ma ¶ait i nipikajakaj, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kaduńß…ôm sa u sumir~…ĺawaj ku kur~…ĺit, anu maduńß…ôm sa u …ôkiman takur~…ĺijawaj ku kur~…ĺit. u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mańßida u maŇčku, r~…ĺabuaj a ńß…ô ¶i mańßida u maduńß…ôm dawmiaj a ar~…ĺupar~…ĺ. u pa…ônu sa mańßida nu ¶ijak a pa…ônu. maŇčduaj a ¶iid u abuabuan sumir~…ĺawaj ku kur~…ĺit, idaw ku mabar~…ĺataj a kubid. ńßatini u r~…ĺima katabaki nu papańß, masaupu i apujuaj a ¶iid nu tatuŇčduńßan, akawaj makidi ¶ tanaju. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) r~…ĺar~…ĺud mabuńßat sibar~…ĺu tu kijukijuan a kur~…ĺit nu bar~…ĺu. ubar~…ĺu nu titiańß…ô ¶i, mańßida u nur~…ĺi, tanaju Ē~ ° ku samur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, mańßida u buwa Ē~ ° ku wajwaj, tusa masakimur~…ĺu, tanaju war~…ĺu a r~…ĺi-mi , pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk tusa tu tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺi-mi , maduńß…ôm sa nu kijuaj a kur~…ĺit, dawmi Ē~ °, mududu ¶ tu bir~…ĺi a k…ôr~…ĺiw ma ¶…ôŇčat. jadańß ku sapar~…ĺuma,ja tanajuaj ti…ôkukaj azińß…ôn ku ńß…ôkaj mapipiaj, r~…ĺum…ôniaj atu r~…ĺum…ôni takur~…ĺijawaj ku kur~…ĺit. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) r~…ĺaŇčawan atu kar~…ĺakar~…ĺakan nutaw a kanatar~…ĺ nikar~…ĺakar~…ĺak: iŇč-nan , s…ô- ¶uwaŇč , kuwaŇč-tuŇč , kuwaŇč-si , ńßu-p…ô , ¶iŇč-si , an-ńßu…ô , ¶iaŇč-su , ńßu-nan , kaŇč-su ńßu- ¶i…ôŇč , ¶…ô- ¶ijaŇč . (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) nutaw a kanatar~…ĺ nikar~…ĺakar~…ĺak: ¶aw-sian, dipun. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ****:**,**) sakajdińßan nuda a …ôpu ¶ u ńß…ô ¶i kapańß kan…ôn, i ¶ijaŇč-si-s…ôŇč pin-sijaŇč-s…ô r~…ĺijaw- ¶ija-wan itiniaj kamu sa r~…ĺat…ôŇč-paw sa, i r~…ĺijaw- ¶ija-wan a kamu sa n…ôw-r~…ĺuaŇč-tu ńßan, nu i buju Ē~ °buju Ē~ °an a ńß…ô ¶i. siwaaj atu ¶a ¶aj a bataan a bur~…ĺad idaw ku maduńß…ômaj a ńß…ô ¶i, nika ja ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka duńß…ômaj a ńß…ô ¶i p…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °an sa pad…ôŇč…ôn i b…ôr~…ĺa ¶ a muduńß…ôm kija kapańß kan…ôn, mańßiniaj a ńß…ô ¶i sa baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku kur~…ĺit, baŇč…ôsis, kapańßaj ku san…ôk , asu Ē~ °a ¶a kan…ôn, ajda i r~…ĺijaw- ¶ija-wan , itiniaj izaw ku nipatid…ôŇč nuńß…ôni tu masaupuaj a kajsija ńßananaj a mir~…ĺaŇčat par~…ĺuma . u ńßu- ¶i…ô min-si a kakitizaan, ¶ijaŇč-si kan-nan a kakitizaan, atu itiniaj i kuwaŇč-tuŇč j…ô-p…ô a kakitizaan, itini i timur~…ĺaj pinaaj a par~…ĺa ¶aaj kaadińß, u san…ôk nida kapańß, u muk…ôr~…ĺidaj tu nu buju Ē~ °buju Ē~ °an a ńß…ô ¶i, mur~…ĺar~…ĺadaj a mu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj nipar~…ĺuma. itiniaj ¶ijaŇč-si kan-nan a kakitizaan, kuwaŇč-tuŇč j…ô-p…ô a kakitizaan, na-t…ôn , na-t…ôn-paw sa. akawaj sipisaŇča Ē~ ° tu sapaiju, u mutuŇč a kaput, mutuŇč a su a nipar~…ĺuma, u r~…ĺamit atu akawaj nu mutuŇč sa kapańß mar~…ĺasapaiju, mińßmińß ¶aan kapańß mijar~…ĺa, ¶ipińß ¶ipińßan mu ¶ik ¶ik pawar~…ĺi…ôn, u sapaiju nu udiudipan, ak…ôn…ôk, ¶u…ôd…ôd sa. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: :*,*.) mutu ¶…ôk paiju mutu ¶…ôk paiju miasik tu udiudipan aisian, ukaukakan pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu idaŇč, pasat…ôd…ôp tu adada, mu ¶…ôr~…ĺip tu b…ôna Ē~ °, pakasisar~…ĺaŇč tu ¶u ¶u Ē~ °. anu mar~…ĺar~…ĺid ku taisian, utiińß muisi, adada ku pukuńß nu ukak, ¶aaj kakapańß ku kabur~…ĺad, tar~…ĺuisi Ē~ °tu sumanańßaj siŇčida, ¶aaj ka tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku sar~…ĺaŇč nu ¶u ¶u Ē~ °.mańßiniaj masur~…ĺit i kanatar~…ĺ nu kanpujaku a ¶uda ( ¶iaŇčku- ¶uŇč ¶awjaw-ńß…ôp…ô, "*******") (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ") tur~…ĺuaj a papańß nu mutuŇč tur~…ĺuaj a papańß nu mutuŇč, u ji- ¶…ô- ¶…ô sa. u kanpujaku a ŇčaŇčan sa, ji- ¶…ô- ¶…ô , war~…ĺuaj si ¶…ôkaaj, war~…ĺuaj a kuwa. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) nar~…ĺimaan kauzip atu nikar~…ĺakar~…ĺak kauzipan nuńß…ôni nu ńßaj-pa sa, i tur~…ĺuaj a r~…ĺasubu katukuńß ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku r~…ĺuma a r~…ĺasubu mi , u buju Ē~ °buju Ē~ °an ¶aajaj ka tabakiaj a kir~…ĺaŇč, izaw a ¶a i ir~…ĺis nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan atu wańß…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ nu ¶ir~…ĺi ¶ir~…ĺisan. kar~…ĺakar~…ĺakan i ¶aŇč- ¶ijaŇč r~…ĺu-ji masasizumaaj a par~…ĺa. izaw a ¶a ku nikar~…ĺakar~…ĺak i dipun atu ¶aw-si…ôŇč . (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) mutuŇč: idaw tu itini ku nikar~…ĺakar~…ĺk i ńßa-tuŇč a kakitizaan . a ¶ak…ôn kja ma ¶api tu maduńß…ômaj a ńß…ô ¶i mar~…ĺasapaiju…ôn. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) ji- ¶…ô- ¶…ô : u kanpujaku a ŇčaŇčan sa, u zajr~…ĺiw nu mańßiniaj sa maazińß i ¶iaŇč-su , ńßu-naŇč , ńßu-p…ô , s…ô- ¶uwaŇč , ¶…ô- ¶ijaŇč aaŇč-ńßu…ô tini a kakitinian. nipawar~…ĺian ku akawaj tu r~…ĺamit mar~…ĺasapaiju. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ***: .) mupur~…ĺu Ē~ ° mutuŇč: i bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan mip…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °, muar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺamit, kajian ku adidiaj ¶iid, ńßir~…ĺńßir~…ĺ ńßan. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) ji- ¶…ô- ¶…ô : r~…ĺar~…ĺud, bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan tusa apuu Ē~ °, ju masa sumir~…ĺaw takur~…ĺijawaj azińß…ôn sa kija mip…ô ¶u Ē~ °tu ńß…ô ¶i, pawar~…ĺin…ôn, atu patajd…ôn i mukur~…ĺkur~…ĺaj a nisaŇčasip tu nanum pa ¶…ôbu ńßan ar~…ĺa…ôn tu pawar~…ĺin. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) mutuŇč: ńßi ¶an mar~…ĺasapaiju, mikapańß tu isi Ē~ °, pa ¶ur~…ĺi tu bajkiŇč. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) ji- ¶…ô- ¶…ô : mipuut tu bajkiŇč, kapańß paiju tu gaŇč nu ¶u ¶u Ē~ °, atu sa…ônu ¶ tu nikan a gaŇč, sipaiju tu ¶…ôbu anu siba…ôtu. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) usan…ôk tu sapakapańß ak…ôn…ôk, ¶u…ôd…ôd tu atudi. mibasaw tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, paisi Ē~ °, pakasisar~…ĺaŇč tu ¶u ¶u Ē~ °. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: *, .) ji- ¶…ô- ¶…ô : misupi tu ataj, paudip tu idaŇč, paisi Ē~ °, mipataj tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) ńßi ¶an mu tu ¶…ôk a paiju: akuti Ē~ ° ku bar~…ĺuwan ńßinar~…ĺibut, adada ku takur~…ĺaw, sumanańß ku isi Ē~ °, mar~…ĺ…ôbawa, masukut ku udiudipan, masat…ôd…ôp kuni kabur~…ĺad, naji ku sar~…ĺaŇč nu ¶u ¶u Ē~ °. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) ji- ¶…ô- ¶…ô : mab…ôsu ku bir~…ĺi, masat…ôd…ôp ku nikabur~…ĺad, ¶aaj kakapańß ku niisi Ē~ °, kar~…ĺatan nu bau atu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj a duka. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam r~…ĺipun atu amir~…ĺika "**"*"***". ak…ôbia *uinata, ¶ommonr~…ĺj known as ¶ńßo ¶or~…ĺat…ô *in…ô, fi*…ô-r~…ĺ…ôaf ¶ńßo ¶or~…ĺat…ô *in…ô, or fi*…ô-r~…ĺ…ôaf ak…ôbia, is a sńßrub tńßat is nati*…ô to *apan, ¶ńßina and kor…ôa, and naturar~…ĺiz…ôd in tńß…ô …ôast…ôrn unit…ôd stat…ôs from g…ôorgia to mi ¶ńßigan to massa ¶ńßus…ôtts.
S.FORM: == mutung == hani maazih ku mutung i Taywan sabul mahmin 400-700 bayu'-takalaw. u papah sa lima-kakuniza, 3-5 bulad sibalu a demiad. sawsawni i Taychun i Taytung i Kalingku i Nantou mazih tu mutung. u balu sa izaw ku sangelacay, izaw ku kalawlaway, bangcal ku balu. u siwkay nu nipaluma u limay ku papah a mutung, u mutung, mitesekay a nipangangan : Akebia quinata han, nu hulam a ngangan sa mu-tung han. u mutung a kaput , mutung a su a kilang. u angangan nu lamit niza, u sasapaiyuen nu kanpuyuku. u heci niza panganganen tu akepi han. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: šļĒŤĎČśú®ťÄö(Ś≠łŚźć:Akebia quinata), .) u a-ke-pi hananay, u heci nu limaay ku papah a mutung, nu sayaway a silangaw na i Dipun, caay kal alecad ku heci tu nu tuluay ku papah mutung-waluay bulad a kuwak, akenek acedah ku heci nu akepi, sicedam ku heci nu waluay bulad a kuwak a heci. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) misitekeday a wayway u mlaladay a kilang, azihen ku hekal nu mutung, mahiza u lima ku wayway nu papah, lima ku adidiay a papah, i sadingsingan mabuhat ku balu, u tatama tu tatayna mapulungay i akaway, nika tabaki ku balu nu tatayna, kala kiyukiyuan makulahay ku kulit, adidi ku balu nu tatama , kalasumanah kiyukiyuan ku kulit, siciyaw-ke-liay ku sanek, masakimulu ku heci nu heci . limaay ku papah a mutung, mapelu'ay a kilang milalibetay a kilang, tanayu sa tuluay ktukuh sabawlima mi , mamin nu udip nayi ku banuh. u heci katukuh balangbangan tu kasienawan macait i nipikayakay, caay henay kaduhem sa u sumilaway ku kulit, anu maduhem sa u ekiman takuliyaway ku kulit. u hekal mahida u mangku, labuay a heci mahida u maduhem dawmiay a alupal. u paenu sa mahida nu ciyak a paenu. mangduay a ciid u abuabuan sumilaway ku kulit, idaw ku mabalatay a kubid. hatini u lima katabaki nu papah, masaupu i apuyuay a ciid nu tatungduhan, akaway makidic tanayu. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) lalud mabuhat sibalu tu kiyukiyuan a kulit nu balu. ubalu nu titiaheci, mahida u nuli, tanayu' ku samulmul, mahida u buwa' ku wayway, tusa masakimulu, tanayu walu a li-mi , patelek tusa tu tulu a li-mi , maduhem sa nu kiyuay a kulit, dawmi', mududuc tu bili a keliw macengat. yadah ku sapaluma,ya tanayuay tiekukay azihen ku hekay mapipiay, lumeniay atu lumeni takuliyaway ku kulit. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) langawan atu kalakalakan nutaw a kanatal nikalakalak: Ing-nan , Se-cuwang , Kuwang-tung , Kuwang-si , Hu-pey , Cing-si , An-huey , Ciang-su , Hu-nan , Kang-su Hu-cieng , Ce-ciyang . (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) nutaw a kanatal nikalakalak: Caw-sian, Dipun. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: ŚúčŚ§ĖŚąÜŚłÉ:śúĚťģģ,śó•śú¨) sakaydihan nuda a epuc u heci kapah kanen, i Ciyang-si-seng pin-siyang-se liyaw-ciya-wan itiniay kamu sa lateng-paw sa, i liyaw-ciya-wan a kamu sa new-luang-tu han, nu I buyu'buyu'an a heci. siwaay atu cacay a bataan a bulad idaw ku maduhemay a heci, nika ya caay henay ka duhemay a heci pelu'an sa padengen i belac a muduhem kiya kapah kanen, mahiniay a heci sa bangcal ku kulit, bangesis, kapahay ku sanek , asu'aca kanen, ayda i liyaw-ciya-wan , itiniay izaw ku nipatideng nuheni tu masaupuay a kaysiya hananay a milangat paluma . u Hu-ciey Min-si a kakitizaan, Ciyang-si Kan-nan a kakitizaan, atu itiniay i Kuwang-tung Ye-pey a kakitizaan, itini i timulay pinaay a pala caay kaadih, u sanek nida kapah, u mukeliday tu nu buyu'buyu'an a heci, mulaladay a mucelakay nipaluma. itiniay Ciyang-si Kan-nan a kakitizaan, Kuwang-tung Ye-pey a kakitizaan, na-ten , na-ten-paw sa. akaway sipisanga' tu sapaiyu, u mutung a kaput, mutung a su a nipaluma, u lamit atu akaway nu mutung sa kapah malasapaiyu, mihmihcaan kapah miyala, cipihcipihan mucikcik pawalien, u sapaiyu nu udiudipan, akenek, cueded sa. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: :Ťč¶,ŚĮí.) mutucek paiyu mutucek paiyu miasik tu udiudipan aisian, ukaukakan paculil tu idang, pasatedep tu adada, mucelip tu bena', pakasisalang tu cucu'. anu malalid ku taisian, utiih muisi, adada ku pukuh nu ukak, caay kakapah ku kabulad, taluisi'tu sumanahay singida, caay ka tahekal ku salang nu cucu'.mahiniay masulit i kanatal nu kanpuyaku a cuda (ciangku-cungcawyaw-heypey, "ŚÖ®Śúčšł≠ŤćČŤĎĮŚĆĮÁ∑®") (u kamu nu Hulam sa: ") tuluay a papah nu mutung tuluay a papah nu mutung, u yi-ce-ce sa. u kanpuyaku a ngangan sa, yi-ce-ce , waluay sicekaay, waluay a kuwa. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) nalimaan kauzip atu nikalakalak kauzipan nuheni nu hay-pa sa, i tuluay a lasubu katukuh cacay a malebut idaw ku luma a lasubu mi , u buyu'buyu'an caayay ka tabakiay a kilang, izaw aca i ilis nu kilakilangan atu wahelul nu cilicilisan. kalakalakan i Cang-ciyang lu-yi masasizumaay a pala. izaw aca ku nikalakalak i Dipun atu Caw-sieng . (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) mutung: idaw tu itini ku nikalakalk i Ha-tung a kakitizaan . acaken kya macapi tu maduhemay a heci malasapaiyuen. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) yi-ce-ce : u kanpuyaku a ngangan sa, u zayliw nu mahiniay sa maazih i Ciang-su , Hu-nang , Hu-pey , Se-cuwang , Ce-ciyang Aang-huey tini a kakitinian. nipawalian ku akaway tu lamit malasapaiyu. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: ť†źÁü•Ś≠ź: .) mupulu' mutung: i balangbangan mipelu', muala tu lamit, kayian ku adidiay ciid, hilhil han. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) yi-ce-ce : lalud, balangbangan tusa apuu', yu masa sumilaw takuliyaway azihen sa kiya mipecu'tu heci, pawalinen, atu patayden i mukulkulay a nisangasip tu nanum pacebu han alaen tu pawalin. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) mutung: hican malasapaiyu, mikapah tu isi', paculi tu bayking. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) yi-ce-ce : mipuut tu bayking, kapah paiyu tu gang nu cucu', atu saenuc tu nikan a gang, sipaiyu tu cebu anu sibaetu. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) usanek tu sapakapah akenek, cueded tu atudi. mibasaw tu lamal nu balucu', paisi', pakasisalang tu cucu'. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: Ťč¶, .) yi-ce-ce : misupi tu atay, paudip tu idang, paisi', mipatay tu cilekay. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) hican mu tucek a paiyu: akuti' ku baluwan hinalibut, adada ku takulaw, sumanah ku isi', malebawa, masukut ku udiudipan, masatedep kuni kabulad, nayi ku salang nu cucu'. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) yi-ce-ce : mabesu ku bili, masatedep ku nikabulad, caay kakapah ku niisi', kalatan nu bau atu cilekay a duka. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu Hulam Lipun atu Amilika "śú®ťÄö"Ťąá"ť¶¨ŚÖúťąī". Akebia quinata, commonly known as chocolate vine, five-leaf chocolate vine, or five-leaf akebia, is a shrub that is native to Japan, China and Korea, and naturalized in the eastern United States from Georgia to Michigan to Massachusetts.
S.PHON: == mutuŇč == ńßani maazińß ku mutuŇč i tajwan sabur~…ĺ mańßmin ***-*** baju Ē~ °-takar~…ĺaw. u papańß sa r~…ĺima-kakuniza, *-* bur~…ĺad sibar~…ĺu a d…ômiad. sawsawni i taj ¶ńßun i tajtuŇč i kar~…ĺiŇčku i nantou mazińß tu mutuŇč. u bar~…ĺu sa izaw ku saŇč…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj, izaw ku kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku bar~…ĺu. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u r~…ĺimaj ku papańß a mutuŇč, u mutuŇč, mit…ôs…ôkaj a nipaŇčaŇčan : ak…ôbia *uinata ńßan, nu ńßur~…ĺam a ŇčaŇčan sa mu-tuŇč ńßan. u mutuŇč a kaput , mutuŇč a su a kir~…ĺaŇč. u aŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺamit niza, u sasapaiju…ôn nu kanpujuku. u ńß…ô ¶i niza paŇčaŇčan…ôn tu ak…ôpi ńßan. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ****(**:ak…ôbia *uinata), .) u a-k…ô-pi ńßananaj, u ńß…ô ¶i nu r~…ĺimaaj ku papańß a mutuŇč, nu sajawaj a sir~…ĺaŇčaw na i dipun, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ ar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku ńß…ô ¶i tu nu tur~…ĺuaj ku papańß mutuŇč-war~…ĺuaj bur~…ĺad a kuwak, ak…ôn…ôk a ¶…ôdańß ku ńß…ô ¶i nu ak…ôpi, si ¶…ôdam ku ńß…ô ¶i nu war~…ĺuaj bur~…ĺad a kuwak a ńß…ô ¶i. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) misit…ôk…ôdaj a wajwaj u mr~…ĺar~…ĺadaj a kir~…ĺaŇč, azińß…ôn ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu mutuŇč, mańßiza u r~…ĺima ku wajwaj nu papańß, r~…ĺima ku adidiaj a papańß, i sadiŇčsiŇčan mabuńßat ku bar~…ĺu, u tatama tu tatajna mapur~…ĺuŇčaj i akawaj, nika tabaki ku bar~…ĺu nu tatajna, kar~…ĺa kijukijuan makur~…ĺańßaj ku kur~…ĺit, adidi ku bar~…ĺu nu tatama , kar~…ĺasumanańß kijukijuan ku kur~…ĺit, si ¶ijaw-k…ô-r~…ĺiaj ku san…ôk, masakimur~…ĺu ku ńß…ô ¶i nu ńß…ô ¶i . r~…ĺimaaj ku papańß a mutuŇč, map…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a kir~…ĺaŇč mir~…ĺar~…ĺib…ôtaj a kir~…ĺaŇč, tanaju sa tur~…ĺuaj ktukuńß sabawr~…ĺima mi , mamin nu udip naji ku banuńß. u ńß…ô ¶i katukuńß bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan tu kasi…ônawan ma ¶ait i nipikajakaj, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kaduńß…ôm sa u sumir~…ĺawaj ku kur~…ĺit, anu maduńß…ôm sa u …ôkiman takur~…ĺijawaj ku kur~…ĺit. u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mańßida u maŇčku, r~…ĺabuaj a ńß…ô ¶i mańßida u maduńß…ôm dawmiaj a ar~…ĺupar~…ĺ. u pa…ônu sa mańßida nu ¶ijak a pa…ônu. maŇčduaj a ¶iid u abuabuan sumir~…ĺawaj ku kur~…ĺit, idaw ku mabar~…ĺataj a kubid. ńßatini u r~…ĺima katabaki nu papańß, masaupu i apujuaj a ¶iid nu tatuŇčduńßan, akawaj makidi ¶ tanaju. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) r~…ĺar~…ĺud mabuńßat sibar~…ĺu tu kijukijuan a kur~…ĺit nu bar~…ĺu. ubar~…ĺu nu titiańß…ô ¶i, mańßida u nur~…ĺi, tanaju Ē~ ° ku samur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, mańßida u buwa Ē~ ° ku wajwaj, tusa masakimur~…ĺu, tanaju war~…ĺu a r~…ĺi-mi , pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk tusa tu tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺi-mi , maduńß…ôm sa nu kijuaj a kur~…ĺit, dawmi Ē~ °, mududu ¶ tu bir~…ĺi a k…ôr~…ĺiw ma ¶…ôŇčat. jadańß ku sapar~…ĺuma,ja tanajuaj ti…ôkukaj azińß…ôn ku ńß…ôkaj mapipiaj, r~…ĺum…ôniaj atu r~…ĺum…ôni takur~…ĺijawaj ku kur~…ĺit. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) r~…ĺaŇčawan atu kar~…ĺakar~…ĺakan nutaw a kanatar~…ĺ nikar~…ĺakar~…ĺak: iŇč-nan , s…ô- ¶uwaŇč , kuwaŇč-tuŇč , kuwaŇč-si , ńßu-p…ô , ¶iŇč-si , an-ńßu…ô , ¶iaŇč-su , ńßu-nan , kaŇč-su ńßu- ¶i…ôŇč , ¶…ô- ¶ijaŇč . (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) nutaw a kanatar~…ĺ nikar~…ĺakar~…ĺak: ¶aw-sian, dipun. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ****:**,**) sakajdińßan nuda a …ôpu ¶ u ńß…ô ¶i kapańß kan…ôn, i ¶ijaŇč-si-s…ôŇč pin-sijaŇč-s…ô r~…ĺijaw- ¶ija-wan itiniaj kamu sa r~…ĺat…ôŇč-paw sa, i r~…ĺijaw- ¶ija-wan a kamu sa n…ôw-r~…ĺuaŇč-tu ńßan, nu i buju Ē~ °buju Ē~ °an a ńß…ô ¶i. siwaaj atu ¶a ¶aj a bataan a bur~…ĺad idaw ku maduńß…ômaj a ńß…ô ¶i, nika ja ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka duńß…ômaj a ńß…ô ¶i p…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °an sa pad…ôŇč…ôn i b…ôr~…ĺa ¶ a muduńß…ôm kija kapańß kan…ôn, mańßiniaj a ńß…ô ¶i sa baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku kur~…ĺit, baŇč…ôsis, kapańßaj ku san…ôk , asu Ē~ °a ¶a kan…ôn, ajda i r~…ĺijaw- ¶ija-wan , itiniaj izaw ku nipatid…ôŇč nuńß…ôni tu masaupuaj a kajsija ńßananaj a mir~…ĺaŇčat par~…ĺuma . u ńßu- ¶i…ô min-si a kakitizaan, ¶ijaŇč-si kan-nan a kakitizaan, atu itiniaj i kuwaŇč-tuŇč j…ô-p…ô a kakitizaan, itini i timur~…ĺaj pinaaj a par~…ĺa ¶aaj kaadińß, u san…ôk nida kapańß, u muk…ôr~…ĺidaj tu nu buju Ē~ °buju Ē~ °an a ńß…ô ¶i, mur~…ĺar~…ĺadaj a mu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj nipar~…ĺuma. itiniaj ¶ijaŇč-si kan-nan a kakitizaan, kuwaŇč-tuŇč j…ô-p…ô a kakitizaan, na-t…ôn , na-t…ôn-paw sa. akawaj sipisaŇča Ē~ ° tu sapaiju, u mutuŇč a kaput, mutuŇč a su a nipar~…ĺuma, u r~…ĺamit atu akawaj nu mutuŇč sa kapańß mar~…ĺasapaiju, mińßmińß ¶aan kapańß mijar~…ĺa, ¶ipińß ¶ipińßan mu ¶ik ¶ik pawar~…ĺi…ôn, u sapaiju nu udiudipan, ak…ôn…ôk, ¶u…ôd…ôd sa. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: :*,*.) mutu ¶…ôk paiju mutu ¶…ôk paiju miasik tu udiudipan aisian, ukaukakan pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu idaŇč, pasat…ôd…ôp tu adada, mu ¶…ôr~…ĺip tu b…ôna Ē~ °, pakasisar~…ĺaŇč tu ¶u ¶u Ē~ °. anu mar~…ĺar~…ĺid ku taisian, utiińß muisi, adada ku pukuńß nu ukak, ¶aaj kakapańß ku kabur~…ĺad, tar~…ĺuisi Ē~ °tu sumanańßaj siŇčida, ¶aaj ka tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku sar~…ĺaŇč nu ¶u ¶u Ē~ °.mańßiniaj masur~…ĺit i kanatar~…ĺ nu kanpujaku a ¶uda ( ¶iaŇčku- ¶uŇč ¶awjaw-ńß…ôp…ô, "*******") (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ") tur~…ĺuaj a papańß nu mutuŇč tur~…ĺuaj a papańß nu mutuŇč, u ji- ¶…ô- ¶…ô sa. u kanpujaku a ŇčaŇčan sa, ji- ¶…ô- ¶…ô , war~…ĺuaj si ¶…ôkaaj, war~…ĺuaj a kuwa. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) nar~…ĺimaan kauzip atu nikar~…ĺakar~…ĺak kauzipan nuńß…ôni nu ńßaj-pa sa, i tur~…ĺuaj a r~…ĺasubu katukuńß ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku r~…ĺuma a r~…ĺasubu mi , u buju Ē~ °buju Ē~ °an ¶aajaj ka tabakiaj a kir~…ĺaŇč, izaw a ¶a i ir~…ĺis nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan atu wańß…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ nu ¶ir~…ĺi ¶ir~…ĺisan. kar~…ĺakar~…ĺakan i ¶aŇč- ¶ijaŇč r~…ĺu-ji masasizumaaj a par~…ĺa. izaw a ¶a ku nikar~…ĺakar~…ĺak i dipun atu ¶aw-si…ôŇč . (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) mutuŇč: idaw tu itini ku nikar~…ĺakar~…ĺk i ńßa-tuŇč a kakitizaan . a ¶ak…ôn kja ma ¶api tu maduńß…ômaj a ńß…ô ¶i mar~…ĺasapaiju…ôn. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) ji- ¶…ô- ¶…ô : u kanpujaku a ŇčaŇčan sa, u zajr~…ĺiw nu mańßiniaj sa maazińß i ¶iaŇč-su , ńßu-naŇč , ńßu-p…ô , s…ô- ¶uwaŇč , ¶…ô- ¶ijaŇč aaŇč-ńßu…ô tini a kakitinian. nipawar~…ĺian ku akawaj tu r~…ĺamit mar~…ĺasapaiju. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ***: .) mupur~…ĺu Ē~ ° mutuŇč: i bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan mip…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °, muar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺamit, kajian ku adidiaj ¶iid, ńßir~…ĺńßir~…ĺ ńßan. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) ji- ¶…ô- ¶…ô : r~…ĺar~…ĺud, bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan tusa apuu Ē~ °, ju masa sumir~…ĺaw takur~…ĺijawaj azińß…ôn sa kija mip…ô ¶u Ē~ °tu ńß…ô ¶i, pawar~…ĺin…ôn, atu patajd…ôn i mukur~…ĺkur~…ĺaj a nisaŇčasip tu nanum pa ¶…ôbu ńßan ar~…ĺa…ôn tu pawar~…ĺin. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) mutuŇč: ńßi ¶an mar~…ĺasapaiju, mikapańß tu isi Ē~ °, pa ¶ur~…ĺi tu bajkiŇč. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) ji- ¶…ô- ¶…ô : mipuut tu bajkiŇč, kapańß paiju tu gaŇč nu ¶u ¶u Ē~ °, atu sa…ônu ¶ tu nikan a gaŇč, sipaiju tu ¶…ôbu anu siba…ôtu. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) usan…ôk tu sapakapańß ak…ôn…ôk, ¶u…ôd…ôd tu atudi. mibasaw tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, paisi Ē~ °, pakasisar~…ĺaŇč tu ¶u ¶u Ē~ °. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: *, .) ji- ¶…ô- ¶…ô : misupi tu ataj, paudip tu idaŇč, paisi Ē~ °, mipataj tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) ńßi ¶an mu tu ¶…ôk a paiju: akuti Ē~ ° ku bar~…ĺuwan ńßinar~…ĺibut, adada ku takur~…ĺaw, sumanańß ku isi Ē~ °, mar~…ĺ…ôbawa, masukut ku udiudipan, masat…ôd…ôp kuni kabur~…ĺad, naji ku sar~…ĺaŇč nu ¶u ¶u Ē~ °. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) ji- ¶…ô- ¶…ô : mab…ôsu ku bir~…ĺi, masat…ôd…ôp ku nikabur~…ĺad, ¶aaj kakapańß ku niisi Ē~ °, kar~…ĺatan nu bau atu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj a duka. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam r~…ĺipun atu amir~…ĺika "**"*"***". ak…ôbia *uinata, ¶ommonr~…ĺj known as ¶ńßo ¶or~…ĺat…ô *in…ô, fi*…ô-r~…ĺ…ôaf ¶ńßo ¶or~…ĺat…ô *in…ô, or fi*…ô-r~…ĺ…ôaf ak…ôbia, is a sńßrub tńßat is nati*…ô to *apan, ¶ńßina and kor…ôa, and naturar~…ĺiz…ôd in tńß…ô …ôast…ôrn unit…ôd stat…ôs from g…ôorgia to mi ¶ńßigan to massa ¶ńßus…ôtts.
